parameters.query: SELECT jp.id, jp.company_name, jp.role_title, jp.job_description, jp.apply_link, pj.simplified_jd, pj.extracted_keywords, pj.ats_keywords, pj.skill_match_score FROM job_postings jp LEFT JOIN processed_jobs pj ON pj.job_id = jp.id WHERE jp.id = $1

messages.content: You are an expert resume writer specializing in ATS optimization for software engineering roles. You tailor resumes to match specific job descriptions while keeping all content truthful. You output strict JSON only — no markdown, no explanation. Output format: { "tailored_summary": "2-3 sentence professional summary", "tailored_skills": ["skill1"], "tailored_experience": [{ "company": "Company Name", "role": "Job Title", "duration": "Month Year – Month Year", "bullets": ["• Action verb + task + metric"] }], "changes_made": ["Changed X to Y because Z"], "ats_score_estimate": 85 }. Rules: NEVER fabricate experience or metrics. ONLY reframe real experience using the JD's language. Use strong action verbs: Built, Architected, Optimized, Led, Reduced, Increased. Mirror JD keywords naturally. Summary must mention the target role and company.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO resume_versions (job_id, version_name, tailored_content, changes_made) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) RETURNING id
INSERT INTO applications_tracker (job_id, resume_version_id, status) VALUES ($1, $2, 'Not Applied') ON CONFLICT (job_id) DO UPDATE SET resume_version_id = $2, last_updated = NOW() RETURNING id
INSERT INTO system_log (workflow, action, data, status) VALUES ('resume-optimizer', 'resume_created', $1, 'success')

additionalFields.queryParams: ={{ JSON.stringify([JSON.stringify({ version_name: $('Save Resume File').item.json.version_name, job_id: $('Save Resume File').item.json.job_id, ats_score: $('Save Resume File').item.json.ats_score_estimate })]) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, version_name: $('Parse & Build Resume').item.json.version_name, resume_id: $('Store Resume Version').item.json.id, ats_score_estimate: $('Parse & Build Resume').item.json.ats_score_estimate }) }}
